message: 🆘 अत्यंत महत्वपूर्ण: एम्स दिल्ली में एक गंभीर सड़क दुर्घटना हुई है। 3 यूनिट O- ब्लड की तुरंत आवश्यकता है। मरीज ICU में है और बहुत खून बह चुका है। कृपया संपर्क करें 9812345678
message_english: 🆘 Extremely important: A severe road accident has happened at AIIMS Delhi. 3 units of O- blood are needed immediately. Patient is in ICU and has lost a lot of blood. Please contact 9812345678

message: KEM मुंबई में प्रसव के दौरान भारी रक्तस्राव हो रहा है। जान बचाने के लिए 5 यूनिट B+ ब्लड अभी चाहिए। जो भी डोनर पास हो कृपया जल्दी अस्पताल पहुंचे।
message_english: Heavy bleeding during childbirth at KEM Mumbai. 5 units of B+ blood needed right now to save a life. Whichever donor is nearby, please reach the hospital quickly.

message: अपोलो चेन्नई में एक मरीज को भारी इंटरनल ब्लीडिंग हो रही है। 4 यूनिट A- ब्लड 1 घंटे के अंदर चाहिए। जिंदगी और मौत का सवाल है, कृपया आगे आएं।
message_english: A patient is having heavy internal bleeding at Apollo Chennai. 4 units of A- blood needed within 1 hour. It is a matter of life and death, please come forward.

message: सफदरजंग अस्पताल के ट्रॉमा सेंटर में AB+ रक्त की 2 यूनिट तुरंत चाहिए। मरीज कोमा में है। कोई डोनर हो तो जल्दी इस नंबर पर कॉल करें 9988776655
message_english: 2 units of AB+ blood are immediately needed at Safdarjung hospital's trauma center. The patient is in a coma. If there is a donor, call this number quickly 9988776655

message: मेदांता में हार्ट अटैक के मरीज को तुरंत 2 यूनिट O+ खून की आवश्यकता है। सर्जरी बीच में रोकनी पड़ी है। डोनर्स प्लीज अस्पताल पहुंचें।
message_english: 2 units of O+ blood are immediately required for a heart attack patient at Medanta. Surgery had to be paused. Donors please reach the hospital.

message: नारायणा बैंगलोर के NICU में प्रीमैच्योर बेबी की हालत बहुत नाजुक है। 1 यूनिट A+ ब्लड अभी के अभी चाहिए। प्लीज मदद करें और मैसेज शेयर करें।
message_english: The condition of a premature baby in Narayana Bangalore's NICU is very critical. 1 unit of A+ blood is needed right now. Please help and share the message.

message: मैक्स साकेत में कैंसर की सर्जरी के बाद हीमोग्लोबिन तेजी से गिर रहा है। 2 यूनिट B- ब्लड कल सुबह तक अरेंज करना है।
message_english: Hemoglobin is dropping rapidly after cancer surgery at Max Saket. Have to arrange 2 units of B- blood by tomorrow morning.

message: पीजीआईएमईआर चंडीगढ़ में गंभीर एनीमिया के कारण मरीज बेहोश है। 3 यूनिट O- ब्लड जल्द से जल्द चाहिए। कृपया संपर्क करें 7000070000
message_english: Patient is unconscious due to severe anemia at PGIMER Chandigarh. 3 units of O- blood are needed as soon as possible. Please contact 7000070000

message: सर गंगा राम दिल्ली में लिवर फेल्योर के केस में 1 यूनिट AB- ब्लड की आवश्यकता है। डोनर कृपया आज रात तक आएं।
message_english: 1 unit of AB- blood is required for a liver failure case at Sir Ganga Ram Delhi. Donor please come by tonight.

message: लीलावती मुंबई में डेंगू की वजह से प्लेटलेट्स सिर्फ 10 हजार रह गए हैं। 2 यूनिट A- ब्लड की बहुत जरूरत है। 9090909090
message_english: Platelets have dropped to just 10 thousand due to dengue at Lilavati Mumbai. 2 units of A- blood are badly needed. 9090909090

message: CMC वेल्लोर में आंतों से ब्लीडिंग हो रही है। 4 यूनिट O+ ब्लड जल्द से जल्द चाहिए। कोई भी ग्रुप मेंबर मदद कर सकता है तो बताएं।
message_english: Intestinal bleeding is happening at CMC Vellore. 4 units of O+ blood needed as soon as possible. If any group member can help, let me know.

message: KIMS हैदराबाद में किडनी के ऑपरेशन में कॉम्प्लिकेशन आ गया है। 2 यूनिट B+ खून चाहिए। डोनर प्लीज आगे आएं।
message_english: Complication has arisen in kidney operation at KIMS Hyderabad. 2 units of B+ blood needed. Donors please come forward.

message: फोर्टिस गुड़गांव में अगले सोमवार को हर्निया की सर्जरी है। ब्लड बैंक में 1 यूनिट A+ ब्लड जमा करना है। कोई डोनर हो तो मैसेज करें।
message_english: Hernia surgery is next Monday at Fortis Gurgaon. Have to deposit 1 unit of A+ blood in the blood bank. If any donor, message me.

message: एम्स दिल्ली में बोन मैरो ट्रांसप्लांट की तैयारी के लिए 2 यूनिट B- ब्लड चाहिए। शुक्रवार तक इंतजाम करना है। 9898989898
message_english: 2 units of B- blood needed for bone marrow transplant prep at AIIMS Delhi. Have to arrange by Friday. 9898989898

message: सफदरजंग अस्पताल में डायलिसिस के लिए 1 यूनिट O+ ब्लड की आवश्यकता है। यह अगले बुधवार को होना है। कृपया मदद करें।
message_english: 1 unit of O+ blood is required for dialysis at Safdarjung Hospital. This is to happen next Wednesday. Please help.

message: अपोलो चेन्नई में अगले हफ्ते मेरे चाचा की बाईपास सर्जरी है। डॉक्टर ने 2 यूनिट AB+ ब्लड अरेंज करने को कहा है।
message_english: My uncle's bypass surgery is next week at Apollo Chennai. The doctor has asked to arrange 2 units of AB+ blood.

message: इस रविवार को दिल्ली के कनॉट प्लेस में रोटरी क्लब का विशाल रक्तदान शिविर है। सुबह 9 बजे से शुरू होगा। कृपया आएं।
message_english: There is a huge blood donation camp by Rotary Club at Connaught Place, Delhi this Sunday. It will start at 9 AM. Please come.

message: मेरी माँ के लिए B+ ब्लड देने वाले सभी फरिश्तों का बहुत-बहुत धन्यवाद। वह अब पूरी तरह से स्वस्थ हैं। 🙏
message_english: Thank you so much to all the angels who gave B+ blood for my mother. She is completely healthy now. 🙏

message: क्या कोई मुझे बता सकता है कि टैटू बनवाने के कितने महीने बाद हम रक्तदान कर सकते हैं? मुझे इस वीकेंड डोनेट करना है।
message_english: Can someone tell me how many months after getting a tattoo we can donate blood? I want to donate this weekend.

message: चंडीगढ़ रेड क्रॉस ब्लड बैंक में 24 घंटे ब्लड उपलब्ध रहता है। किसी भी इमरजेंसी में वहां जरूर संपर्क करें।
message_english: Blood is available 24 hours at Chandigarh Red Cross Blood Bank. Do contact them in any emergency.

message: Bhai log KEM Mumbai me bohot bura road accident ka case hai. 3 unit B- URGENTLY chahiye!! Pls koi jaldi aao 9811122233. Khoon bohot beh chuka hai 🆘
message_english: Brothers, there is a very bad road accident case at KEM Mumbai. 3 units of B- URGENTLY needed!! Pls someone come quickly 9811122233. A lot of blood has been lost 🆘

message: Fortis Gurgaon me gunshot wound ka patient laya gaya hai. 5 unit O+ blood ki immediate requirement hai. Please RT and share karo sab groups me!
message_english: A gunshot wound patient has been brought to Fortis Gurgaon. Immediate requirement of 5 units of O+ blood. Please RT and share in all groups!

message: Medanta ICU me patient sink kar raha hai. 2 unit AB- blood abhi ke abhi chahiye. Doctors bol rhe hain bilkul time nahi hai. Pls help!!
message_english: Patient is sinking in Medanta ICU. 2 units of AB- blood needed right now. Doctors are saying there is absolutely no time. Pls help!!

message: Sir Ganga Ram Delhi me liver burst ho gaya hai surgery ke dauran. 4 unit A- blood ki bohot urgent need hai. Call 9990001112
message_english: Liver has burst during surgery at Sir Ganga Ram Delhi. There is a very urgent need for 4 units of A- blood. Call 9990001112

message: CMC Vellore me critical premature baby ko 1 unit O- blood chahiye emergency me. Please jo aas paas ho jaldi aaye, baby ki jaan khatre me hai.
message_english: Critical premature baby needs 1 unit of O- blood in emergency at CMC Vellore. Whoever is nearby please come quickly, the baby's life is in danger.

message: Cardiac arrest aaya hai patient ko KIMS Hyderabad me. 3 unit B+ blood chahiye turant resuscitation ke liye. Please donate kare dosto.
message_english: Patient has suffered a cardiac arrest at KIMS Hyderabad. 3 units of B+ blood needed immediately for resuscitation. Please donate friends.

message: Lilavati Mumbai me massive stroke ke karan patient coma me hai. 2 unit A+ blood chahiye within 30 mins. Ekdum urgent hai. Call 8888000011
message_english: Patient is in coma due to a massive stroke at Lilavati Mumbai. 2 units of A+ blood needed within 30 mins. Absolutely urgent. Call 8888000011

message: Max Saket me severe burns ka case aaya hai fire se. 4 unit AB+ blood ki immediate zaroorat hai. Please koi ignore mat karna, bacha lo.
message_english: A case of severe burns from fire has come to Max Saket. Immediate need for 4 units of AB+ blood. Please don't ignore, save them.

message: Brain hemorrhage ho gaya hai AIIMS Delhi me. Surgery beech me ruki hai, 2 unit O+ blood chahiye abhi ke abhi. Contact 7777766666
message_english: Brain hemorrhage has occurred at AIIMS Delhi. Surgery is paused midway, 2 units of O+ blood needed right now. Contact 7777766666

message: Safdarjung me dengue fever severe ho gaya hai. 2 unit B- blood chahiye by evening. Drop a text ya DM karo agar aa sakte ho.
message_english: Dengue fever has become severe at Safdarjung. 2 units of B- blood needed by evening. Drop a text or DM if you can come.

message: Apollo Chennai me chemo support ke liye 3 unit A- blood required hai kal subah tak. Count bohot low chal raha hai. Kisi ko lead pata hai?
message_english: 3 units of A- blood required for chemo support at Apollo Chennai by tomorrow morning. Count is running very low. Anyone know a lead?

message: PGIMER Chandigarh me hemoglobin 5 pe aa gaya hai patient ka. 1 unit AB- blood ka prabandh karna hai kal dopahar tak. Please help.
message_english: Patient's hemoglobin has dropped to 5 at PGIMER Chandigarh. Have to arrange 1 unit of AB- blood by tomorrow afternoon. Please help.

message: Narayana Bangalore me bypass surgery ki preparation chal rahi hai. 2 unit O- chahiye donor. Blood bank khali hai. Call 9988998899
message_english: Preparation for bypass surgery is going on at Narayana Bangalore. Need 2 units O- donor. Blood bank is empty. Call 9988998899

message: Fortis Gurgaon me bleeding ulcer ka case hai. 3 unit A+ blood chahiye raat 8 baje tak. Please check karke groups me batao.
message_english: Bleeding ulcer case at Fortis Gurgaon. 3 units of A+ blood needed by 8 PM tonight. Please check and tell in the groups.

message: KEM Mumbai me acute liver failure hua hai. 2 unit B+ blood chahiye reserve me rakhne ke liye kal subah tak.
message_english: Acute liver failure has occurred at KEM Mumbai. 2 units of B+ blood needed to keep in reserve by tomorrow morning.

message: CMC Vellore me platelets achanak drop ho gaye hain. 1 unit O+ required urgently aaj hi. Contact 9123491234
message_english: Platelets have suddenly dropped at CMC Vellore. 1 unit of O+ required urgently today itself. Contact 9123491234

message: Medanta Gurgaon me urgent transplant schedule hua hai. 2 unit AB+ chahiye kal dopehar tak for safe side.
message_english: Urgent transplant has been scheduled at Medanta Gurgaon. 2 units of AB+ needed by tomorrow afternoon for safe side.

message: Max Saket me poison case aaya hai, condition thodi critical hai. 1 unit A- chahiye turant blood wash ke liye.
message_english: A poison case has arrived at Max Saket, condition is a bit critical. 1 unit of A- needed immediately for a blood wash.

message: Sir Ganga Ram Delhi me dada ji ki planned hip replacement hai Friday ko. Blood bank ne 2 unit O- deposit karne ko bola hai.
message_english: Grandfather's planned hip replacement is on Friday at Sir Ganga Ram Delhi. The blood bank has asked to deposit 2 units of O-.

message: Lilavati Mumbai me routine transfusion hona hai is week. 1 unit B+ blood chahiye hoga. Koi healthy donor ho toh batana 8000080000 par.
message_english: Routine transfusion is to happen this week at Lilavati Mumbai. 1 unit of B+ blood will be needed. If there's any healthy donor, let me know on 8000080000.

message: KIMS Hyderabad me spinal surgery ke liye 2 unit A+ blood arrange karna hai Wednesday ko. Doctor ne bola abhi se donor ready rakho.
message_english: Need to arrange 2 units of A+ blood for spinal surgery at KIMS Hyderabad on Wednesday. The doctor said to keep the donor ready from now.

message: Apollo Chennai me elective chemo start honi hai Tuesday ko. 1 unit AB- blood dena padega hospital me replacement ke liye.
message_english: Elective chemo is to start at Apollo Chennai on Tuesday. Will have to give 1 unit of AB- blood in the hospital for replacement.

message: Upcoming tumor removal surgery ke liye PGIMER Chandigarh me 2 unit O+ blood chahiye aane wale somvaar ke liye.
message_english: 2 units of O+ blood are needed for upcoming tumor removal surgery at PGIMER Chandigarh for the coming Monday.

message: Planned dialysis hai AIIMS Delhi me is weekend. Blood bank ne 1 unit B- blood secure karne ko bola hai safe side.
message_english: Planned dialysis is at AIIMS Delhi this weekend. Blood bank has told to secure 1 unit of B- blood on the safe side.

message: Delhi NCR walo, is sunday Noida sec 18 me mega blood camp hai. Refreshment free milega. Jarur aao donate karne aur certificate pao.
message_english: Delhi NCR folks, there is a mega blood camp in Noida sec 18 this Sunday. Refreshment will be free. Definitely come to donate and get a certificate.

message: Jisne bhi mere brother ke liye O- diya unko bada wala Thank You! Wo ab bilkul theek hain aur discharge ho gaye.
message_english: A big Thank You to whoever gave O- for my brother! He is completely fine now and has been discharged.

message: Covid recovery ke kitne mahine baad blood donate kar sakte hain? Mujhe donation karna hai Pune me kal. Kisi ko idea hai?
message_english: How many months after Covid recovery can one donate blood? I have to donate in Pune tomorrow. Does anyone have an idea?

message: Bangalore me verified NGOs ka koi contact list hai jo emergency me blood arrange karte hain? Ek list banani hai society ke liye.
message_english: Is there any contact list of verified NGOs in Bangalore that arrange blood in emergency? Need to make a list for the society.

message: Youth ko aage aana chahiye! Har 3 mahine me ek baar blood donate zaroor kare. Chennai ke sabhi dosto ko tag karo aur aage badho.
message_english: Youth should come forward! Definitely donate blood once every 3 months. Tag all friends in Chennai and step forward.

message: Humari company Gurgaon me kal corporate blood drive organise kar rahi hai Red Cross ke sath. Apne friends aur family ko zarur le aao.
message_english: Our company is organizing a corporate blood drive tomorrow in Gurgaon with the Red Cross. Definitely bring your friends and family.
